creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
'make makesum' fails:
> go: github.com/golang/glog@v1.0.0 (replaced by ./build/replacements/github.com/golang/glog): reading build/replacements/github.com/golang/glog/go.mod: open /disk-samsung/freebsd-ports/distfiles/go/sysutils_opa/opa-v0.44.0/build/replacements/github.com/golang/glog/go.mod: no such file or directory
